overall.description: First-person driving gameplay from Cyberpunk 2077, navigating through Night City at night during rainfall. The player drives through districts including Vista Del Rey, Corpo Plaza, and Downtown, passing neon-lit skyscrapers, digital billboards, and wet reflective streets.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit commercial street in Vista Del Rey

events.description: Vista Del Rey district marker appears, entering this neighborhood with distinct neon signage
making a right turn at intersection, navigating around corner

agents.ego_description: navigating wet city streets in Vista Del Rey, making turns at intersections while observing neon signage and maintaining moderate speed

notable_agents.action: oncoming car passing through intersection from opposite direction

entered.detail: large illuminated digital advertisements with pink and cyan neon colors dominating the skyline
rain-slicked road surface reflecting neon lights and street illumination
tall industrial-style pole with multiple lamp heads illuminating the street
tall buildings covered in neon signage and illuminated windows

segments.scene_description: Driving through the rain-soaked streets of Vista Del Rey at night, navigating past vibrant neon billboards and illuminated building facades. The wet asphalt reflects the colorful lights as the vehicle makes a right turn at an intersection, passing an oncoming car.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-lane arterial road with overpass structures

events.description: passing under large concrete overpass structure, lighting changes temporarily
accelerating to higher speed on straightaway, reaching 50+ km/h

agents.ego_description: accelerating along multi-lane arterial road, passing under overpasses and maintaining steady course through the city

entered.detail: large concrete bridge structure crossing over the roadway with support pillars
illuminated directional signs hanging above the road indicating routes
yellow and black striped safety barriers along the road edge

segments.scene_description: Accelerating along a wide multi-lane road, passing under concrete overpasses that briefly darken the scene. The vehicle moves past highway signage and yellow safety barriers while the urban skyline shifts from right to left. Speed increases significantly on the straightaway.

scene_state.functional_zone: corporate plaza with modern glass architecture

events.description: entering Corpo Plaza district with distinct corporate architecture and yellow road dividers
approaching intersection with traffic lights and crosswalk markings

agents.ego_description: cruising through Corpo Plaza at steady speed, passing modern corporate towers and large digital displays while maintaining lane position

notable_agents.action: distant vehicle ahead traveling in same direction

entered.detail: tall modern skyscraper with illuminated windows and corporate branding
massive curved digital screen displaying high-resolution advertisements
continuous yellow concrete barrier separating opposing traffic lanes

segments.scene_description: Entering the Corpo Plaza district characterized by sleek corporate glass towers and massive digital billboards. The vehicle cruises steadily past yellow road dividers and modern architecture, approaching an intersection with traffic controls while following a distant vehicle ahead.

events.description: entering Downtown district with denser building arrangement
slowing down significantly from 35 km/h to under 20 km/h approaching intersection

agents.ego_description: decelerating as approaching downtown intersection, preparing to stop or navigate the crosswalk area

entered.detail: dense cluster of mid-rise buildings with various commercial signage
zebra crossing stripes painted on the wet road surface
tall pole with multiple illuminated signal lights showing green

segments.scene_description: Entering the Downtown district and slowing down significantly while approaching an intersection. The vehicle passes crosswalk markings and traffic lights, with dense downtown buildings lining the right side. The speed decreases as the driver prepares to navigate the intersection.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person drive through a rain-slicked metropolis, transitioning from the vibrant neon streets of Vista Del Rey to the imposing corporate architecture of the city center. It begins by navigating rain-soaked intersections where colorful billboards reflect off the wet asphalt, before accelerating onto a wide multi-lane road. As the vehicle speeds under darkening concrete overpasses and past yellow safety barriers, the urban skyline shifts rapidly until the scene opens into the sleek, glass-towered landscape of Corpo Plaza. The camera then cruises steadily past massive digital displays and modern corporate facades before finally entering the dense Downtown district, where the vehicle slows significantly as it approaches a crowded intersection lined with towering buildings.
